The {{RewardIconWithLink|Rewards Box|orange}} is available for purchase in the [[Vending Machine]] every day for 200 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}. It is unlocked after defeating the [[Events#Cancer_Cells|Cancer Cell of Earth's Will Level 1]] for the first time. 

The rewards are the following:
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Neurolink, +4}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Super Memetic Chest, +2|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
